meaning: n.艺术品或古董,爱好古董者
examples: The reporter was curious where the Vertu would tell him to go in Manhattan.
Has launched in 2007 a new model - Vertu Ascent Ferrari 1947 Limited Edition.
He has gone through six Vertu phones and is the company's new U. S. brand ambassador.
Head of design Mr Hutchison said that Vertu was not interested in being a tech pioneer.
Even Vertu's former parent company Nokia sold more than 35 million smartphones last year.
